column1: # Dataset type: high-volume behavioral / engagement time-series
# Rationale: Gameplay engagement is produced by every active PS5 session across all Sony titles.
#            At scale this is billions of events per day. It is not appropriate to store in Salesforce.
#            In production this lives in Snowflake as the PS5_ENGAGEMENT schema. Data Cloud ingests
#            weekly rollups via zero-copy connector and maps to the Engagement Profile DMO.
#            Agentforce uses this to personalize Marcus's offer copy with activity-aware language.
